title: 続きを進めて。/kernelで。 /kernel verdict を実装に落とします。まず SSOT と gate/test の現状を読み、次に「substitution 禁止・shadow continuity の み許可」を文書化し、最後に静的テストで固定します。 • Updated Plan └ Implement the /kernel-verified fallback policy: forbid baseline substitution by Copilot/Gemini, allow only shadow continuity, and lock it in with do...
summary_text: 1. High: `425b88e4` is not self-contained against clean `4218a55`. It adds [test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/fugue-consensus-apply-20260312104349/tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh) but does not carry the matching harness implementation changes into [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh) or [generate-tutti-comment.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/generate-tutti-comment.sh). On `4218a55`, those files still use the old baseline-trio logic/wording and have no `fallback_used`/`shadow continuity` handling, so this forward-port will either break the new test immediately or leave the GitHub/harness path semantically stale even if the local path passes. 2. Medium: the cherry-pick is likely trivial on a clean tree because `4218a5548a1cbae86a1a46fe581f532283efe0eb` is the merge-base of `425b88e4`, but it is operationally blocked in the current checkout. The target repo already has local modifications in all six overlapping tracked files, including [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md), [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md), [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md), [subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh), [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh), and [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh), and it already has an untracked [test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh) at the same path the commit wants to create. A direct `git cherry-pick` in this worktree will stop before you even get to semantic verification. 3. Medium: the task-owned test set is not sufficient for what this commit changes. [test-local-orchestration-shadow-continuity.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/fugue-consensus-apply-20260312104349/tests/test-local-orchestration-shadow-continuity.sh) exercises the local integrator, but there is no direct test for the raw contract emitted by [subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/fugue-consensus-apply-20260312104349/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh), no direct test for metered-lane suppression/enablement in [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/fugue-consensus-apply-20260312104349/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh), no xAI coverage, and no local `/vote` case proving `VOTE_COMMAND_INPUT=true` forces the stricter fail-closed path. That gap matters because the runner currently records `fallback_provider="copilot"` rather than the documented `copilot-cli`, and nothing in this commit would catch that reporting drift.
